Let $logins
  Project(src_ip->client_ip)
    Aggregate(count() as failures by src_ip)
      Filter(((type == "USER_LOGIN") and (res == "failed")))
        Scan(idx_audit)
Let $threats
  Project(client_ip, threat_type)
    Filter((threat_type in ["sqli", "path_traversal"]))
      Scan(idx_backend)
Project(client_ip, threat_type, failures)
  Join(inner, on=[client_ip])
    Project(client_ip, threat_type)
      Filter((threat_type in ["sqli", "path_traversal"]))
        Scan(idx_backend)
    Right:
      Project(src_ip->client_ip)
        Aggregate(count() as failures by src_ip)
          Filter(((type == "USER_LOGIN") and (res == "failed")))
            Scan(idx_audit)
